title: Suleiman the Magnificent becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Suleiman I, commonly known as Suleiman the Magnificent, was the Ottoman sultan from 1520 to 1566.

title: Mehmed II becomes sultan of the Ottoman Empire
fact: Mehmed II, commonly known as Mehmed the Conqueror, was the sultan of the Ottoman Empire twice, from August 1444 to September 1446 and then later from February 1451 to May 1481.
